featureName: Sprint 9 — Profile Pages Bug Fixes & Feature Completion
description: Fix all 17 identified issues in Profile-related screens: crashes, missing features, UX problems, and data issues. Covers ProfileScreen, EditProfileScreen, PublicProfileScreen, PhotoGalleryScreen, and VerificationCentreScreen.

userStories.title: Fix Critical Bugs — EmptyState Import, Image Loading, Memory Leak
userStories.description: Fix the 3 critical bugs that cause crashes or broken rendering in Profile screens.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a shared EmptyState widget at lib/core/widgets/empty_state.dart (extracted from photo_gallery_screen.dart), accepting emoji, title, and optional subtitle params
Update public_profile_screen.dart to import and use the shared EmptyState widget for 'No reviews yet' and other empty states
Update photo_gallery_screen.dart to import from the shared widget instead of defining its own
Replace all Image.network() in photo_gallery_screen.dart with CachedNetworkImage with errorWidget and placeholder
Fix rate controller memory leak in edit_profile_screen.dart: properly dispose all dynamically created TextEditingControllers in dispose(), track them in a Map that gets cleaned up
Fix empty caption string showing empty overlay bar in photo_gallery_screen.dart: check caption != null && caption!.isNotEmpty
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Photo Gallery — Loading States, Fullscreen View, Cover Photo Fix
userStories.description: Add loading indicators for delete/cover operations, implement fullscreen photo view, and fix cover photo persistence.
acceptanceCriteria: Add loading state to _deletePhoto(): show CircularProgressIndicator while deletion is in progress, disable button during operation
Add loading state to _setCover(): show snackbar 'Setting cover photo...' then 'Cover photo updated!' on success
Implement photo tap to open fullscreen: use photo_view package (already in pubspec) to show tapped photo in a fullscreen dialog/page with pinch-to-zoom
Fix cover photo persistence: after uploading first photo, ensure isCover=true is properly saved via updatePhotosArray
Add explicit back button to PhotoGalleryScreen AppBar as fallback (like TaskDetailScreen pattern)
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: PublicProfile — Photo Fullscreen, Report/Block Placeholder, Consistent Empty States
userStories.description: Fix photo tap, add report/block user stubs with feedback, and make empty states consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement photo tap on PublicProfileScreen: open fullscreen photo_view on tap (same as PhotoGallery implementation)
Report User button: show confirmation dialog 'Report this user?' then snackbar 'Report submitted. We will review this.' (no backend needed yet, just UI feedback)
Block User button: show confirmation dialog 'Block this user? You won't see their tasks or bids.' then snackbar 'User blocked.' (no backend needed yet, just UI feedback)
Add consistent empty states: Skills section shows 'No skills listed' when empty (instead of hiding), About section shows placeholder when bio is null
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: EditProfile — Fix Service Rates Data Type, Improve Error Handling
userStories.description: Store service rates as doubles, improve form error recovery, and fix field-level validation UX.
acceptanceCriteria: Change service rates storage: save hourlyRate as double (not String) in Firestore. Parse text field value with double.tryParse before saving
PublicProfileScreen: update rate display to handle both String and double values from Firestore (backward compatibility)
On save failure: retain all form field values (don't clear them). Show specific error message in snackbar
Add field-level validation feedback: required fields show red border when empty on submit attempt
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: ProfileScreen — Role Change Refresh, Stats Empty State, Verification Centre
userStories.description: Fix role change not refreshing UI, add stats empty state for new providers, and implement basic Verification Centre.
acceptanceCriteria: After role change in _RolePickerSheet: force refresh currentUserProvider so ProfileScreen immediately shows new role and HomeScreen switches view
For new providers with null stats: show a 'Your stats will appear after completing your first task' message instead of hiding the section completely
VerificationCentreScreen: replace stub with a real screen showing list of verification badges (phoneVerified, idVerified, policeCleared, etc.) with their current status (verified/not verified)
Each badge row shows: emoji, label, status chip (Verified in green or Not Verified in grey), and a 'Verify' button for unverified badges
Tapping 'Verify' on unverified badges shows snackbar 'Verification coming soon — we will notify you when available'
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Final Verification — All Profile Screens Work End-to-End
userStories.description: Verify all profile screens compile and work correctly, run flutter analyze and flutter test.
acceptanceCriteria: flutter analyze shows 0 errors
flutter test — all existing unit tests pass (fix any broken by profile changes)

Manual verification checklist (code review): ProfileScreen renders without crash, EditProfileScreen saves all fields correctly, PublicProfileScreen handles all empty states, PhotoGalleryScreen loads/deletes/covers photos, VerificationCentreScreen renders badge list
No TODO comments left in profile screens (all replaced with real implementations or proper placeholder UX)
Commit all changes
